title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: Vatican says SSPX in schism, affirms excommunication of laity and clerics
stories.summary:
Vatican says SSPX in schism, affirms excommunication of laity and clerics. The Catholic Church’s preeminent traditionalists now find themselves firmly outside its communion, and the Vatican laments that they have only themselves to blame.

The Holy See recognized on Thursday the self-inflicted excommunication of the Society of St.

Pius X after the priestly fraternity defied the pope with an illicit consecration of bishops. Four priests were […].

Al Jazeera: What is the Society of St Pius X? Why Pope Leo excommunicated its members.

Al Jazeera reports that the Vatican declares 'schism' in Catholic Church after bishops were ordained without Pope Leo XIV's approval.

links.headline: Vatican excommunicates schismatic bishops and priests, and warns their followers
links.excerpt: The Vatican responded aggressively Thursday to a traditionalist group that consecrated bishops without the pope's consent, declaring the Society of St. Pius X had formally broken with the Catholic Church. It excommunicated its bishops and priests, and warned its faithful that they too face the harshest sanctions in the church.

stories.title: Report: Iraqi 'Godfather' of Migrant Smuggling Convicted in France, Seeks Asylum in U.K.
stories.summary:
Report: Iraqi 'Godfather' of Migrant Smuggling Convicted in France, Seeks Asylum in U.K.. An Iraqi man convicted in France of illicit migrant smuggling and described as the "godfather" of French migrant camps is living in Leicestershire and seeking asylum in the United Kingdom, outlets warned on Thursday.

The post Report: Iraqi ‘Godfather’ of Migrant Smuggling Convicted in France, Seeks Asylum in U.K. appeared first on. BBC: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum.

BBC reports that once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.

stories.title: U.S. Declines to Renew Trade Pact with Mexico and Canada
stories.summary:
U.S. Declines to Renew Trade Pact with Mexico and Canada. The Trump administration on Wednesday declined to renew its trade pact with Mexico and Canada, more formally known as the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA).

The post U.S. Declines to Renew Trade Pact with Mexico and Canada appeared first on Breitbart .

Al Jazeera: Why has Trump refused to renew the USMCA, and what will that mean? Al Jazeera reports that trade ambassador says US will not approve trilateral agreement with Canada and Mexico 'in its current form'.

stories.title: 11-year-old dies from rabies after bat landed on his face while he was sleeping
stories.summary:
11-year-old dies from rabies after bat landed on his face while he was sleeping. An 11-year-old boy in Ontario died of rabies after a bat landed on his face as he slept, according to the Canadian Medical Association Journal.

BBC: Canadian boy, 11, dies of rabies after waking to bat on his face.

BBC reports that rabies infections are rare in Canada. There have been 28 human deaths due to rabies in the country since 1924.

stories.title: Washington Post Panics Over Trump’s July Fourth Fireworks: ‘Wear An N95 Mask’
stories.summary:

Just days before Americans gather in the nation’s capital to celebrate the country’s 250th anniversary festivities, The Washington Post published a report warning that the massive pyrotechnic display ... Washington Times: 74 things to do in Washington, D.C. this Independence Day weekend: July 3-5.

stories.title: Abdul el Sayed vows to take on Schumer as left-wing candidates gain momentum
stories.summary:
Abdul el Sayed vows to take on Schumer as left-wing candidates gain momentum. Michigan Senate candidate Abdul el Sayed directly juxtaposed his candidacy with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer‘s (D-NY) chamber agenda on Thursday, distancing himself further from the Democratic establishment that is backing one of his opponents.

“He doesn’t want to see me on the inside of the U.S. Senate,” el Sayed said after Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez […]. Washington Times: AOC jumps into Michigan Senate fight, backing El-Sayed over party establishment.

Washington Times reports that rep.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is flexing her political muscle for Abdul El-Sayed's bid for the U.S. Senate in Michigan -- her first move into a contested Democratic primary this cycle and a clear signal that the party's left flank is rallying around its preferred candidate ahead of next month's vote.

stories.title: Gina Rinehart and estranged kids to pay large legal costs after royalties trial
stories.summary: Gina Rinehart and estranged kids to pay large legal costs after royalties trial. Mining billionaire Gina Rinehart and her two estranged children will have to pay a large chunk of the legal costs able to be recovered from a mammoth trial that determined the payment of royalties from some of Australia's most lucrative iron ore mines, a WA judge has ruled.

stories.title: As an Australian Jew who publicly supports Palestinian freedom, I’m targeted by my own community – and neo-Nazis | Sarah Schwartz
stories.summary:
As an Australian Jew who publicly supports Palestinian freedom, I’m targeted by my own community – and neo-Nazis | Sarah Schwartz. Jews should be able to criticise the actions of Israel without risking exclusion from communal life As a teenager, I walked through concentration camps in Poland, where the Nazis industrialised the murder of European Jewry.

That history has shaped not only my Jewish identity, but a commitment to political struggle. It taught me that memory carries not only grief, but obligations: to resist racism, dehumanisation and the silence that permits the erasure of a people.

Today, I.

stories.title: Doubt that Elon Musk ‘earned’ his trillion? Rightwing media says you’re in an ‘impotent envy cult’ | Arwa Mahdawi
stories.summary:
Doubt that Elon Musk ‘earned’ his trillion? Rightwing media says you’re in an ‘impotent envy cult’ | Arwa Mahdawi.

The lovefest from Musk’s conservative fans completely overlooks the unscrupulous tactics behind his immense wealth For 12 glorious days in June, Elon Musk experienced something nobody else in the history of humankind has ever experienced: trillionaire status.

Did all those zeros make Musk happy? Did the army of children he has sired love him more?

Did he find inner peace? We’ll never know b.

stories.summary: Rapid spread of AI may worsen global inequality, UN warns. Panel proses shared framework for responsible AI development as adoption grows unevenly across world A new United Nations report warns that the development of artificial intelligence may exacerbate global inequality and proposes a shared framework for how to responsibly develop AI, as adoption and investment into the technology accelerates unevenly.

stories.title: Labor group asks gov’t to help stop sugar farm infestation
stories.summary:
Labor group asks gov’t to help stop sugar farm infestation. BACOLOD CITY—The General Alliance of Workers Associations (GAWA) on Thursday called for immediate and direct government intervention to halt a Red-Striped Soft-Scale Insect (RSSI) infestation before it completely paralyzes the country’s sugar industry.

GAWA secretary general Wennie Sancho warned that further delay would worsen the crisis, noting that agricultural damage is already spreading rapidly across major.

stories.title: DepEd issues guidelines to address school security violations
stories.summary:
DepEd issues guidelines to address school security violations.

MANILA, Philippines — The Department of Education (DepEd) has issued streamlined guidelines to address security violations within schools, classifying bomb threats and carrying and concealing deadly weapons as critical offenses that carry severe disciplinary penalties.

stories.title: Ombudsman: Conflict of interest complaints vs 2 solons reach probe stage
stories.summary:
Ombudsman: Conflict of interest complaints vs 2 solons reach probe stage. MANILA, Philippines — The conflict of interest complaints over alleged ownership of construction firms of two congressmen have reached the preliminary investigation stage, according to Assistant Ombudsman Mico Clavano on Thursday.

Clavano noted a general rule that personalities involved in cases cannot be named during the fact-finding investigation level. READ: Uswag Ilonggo Rep. Ang to.

stories.summary:

LUCENA CITY, Quezon – Health authorities in four municipalities in Rizal province have intensified preparations for the upcoming vaccination campaign against measles and rubella, aiming to ensure the success of the government’s immunization drive in August.

stories.title: 17 nabbed for illegal mining in Camarines Norte
stories.summary:
17 nabbed for illegal mining in Camarines Norte. LEGAZPI CITY, Albay — Seventeen individuals were arrested during a joint, intelligence-driven operation against illegal mining in Barangay Luklukan Sur in Panganiban town, Camarines Norte.

The operation was led by the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI), in coordination with the Mines and Geosciences Bureau (MGB) and the Jose Panganiban Municipal Police Station under the Camarines.
